revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24618454543|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Arakashi-jinja]] [[ja:荒橿神社]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Arakashi Shrine (Q11618763) | native_name = 荒橿神社 | image = 荒橿神社 拝殿.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Arakashi Shrine (Q11618763) | coordinates = {{coord|36.538916666666665|140.19075}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Kuni-no-Tokotachi|lt=Kuni-no-Tokotachi|ca|Kunitokotatchi|en|Kuni-no-Tokotachi|es|Kunitokotachi|fr|Kunitokotachi|ja|国之常立神|mni|ꯀꯨꯅꯤ-ꯅꯣ-ꯇꯣꯀꯣꯇꯆꯤ|ru|Куни-но токотати-но микото|simple|Kuni-no-Tokotachi|th|คูนิ โนะ โทโกตาจิ|uk|Куні но токотаті но камі|zh|國常立尊|qid=Q478504|1=Kuni-no-Tokotachi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Arakashi Shrine'''|荒橿神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shimotsuke Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province|ja|下野国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11361380|1=List of Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province}} ** Series ordinal: 6 ** P155: {{ill|Q11433065|ltq=Q11433065|qid=Q11433065|1=Ōsaki Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Takebuyama Shrine|lt=Takebuyama Shrine|ja|健武山神社|qid=Q119929432|1=Takebuyama Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q644327|ltq=Q644327|qid=Q644327|1=Motegi, Tochigi}} * {{ill|Q1053699|ltq=Q1053699|qid=Q1053699|1=Shimotsuke Province}} * {{ill|Haga District, Tochigi|lt=Haga district|ar|مقاطعة هاغا|ca|Districte de Haga|ceb|Haga-gun|en|Haga District, Tochigi|fa|شهرستان هاگا، توچیگی|fr|District de Haga|id|Distrik Haga, Tochigi|it|Distretto di Haga|ja|芳賀郡|ko|하가군|nl|Haga (district)|pl|Powiat Haga|uk|Повіт Хаґа|vi|Haga (huyện)|zh_yue|芳賀郡|zh|芳賀郡|qid=Q1192087|1=Haga District, Tochigi}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|36.538916666666665|140.19075}} == image (P18) == * 荒橿神社 拝殿.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q478504|ltq=Q478504|qid=Q478504|1=Kuni-no-Tokotachi}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182032 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q90139226|ltq=Q90139226|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == legal form (P1454) == * {{ill|Q7311343|ltq=Q7311343|qid=Q7311343|1=religious corporation}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * あらかしじんじゃ == postal code (P281) == * 321-3566https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 2060005003065 == Commons category (P373) == * Arakashi-jinja == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Arakashi Shrine|lt=Arakashi Shrine|qid=Q135039974|1=Arakashi Shrine (Q135039974)}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '栃木県芳賀郡茂木町小井戸325', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Arakashi-jinja}} [[JA:荒橿神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11618763}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Arakashi Shrine |Image = [[File:Arakashi Shrine Haiden.jpg|270px]]
Haiden (worship hall) |Location = {{ill|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|Q44843|qid=Q44843|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Haga District|Q1192087|qid=Q1192087|1=Haga District, Tochigi}}{{ill|lt=Motegi Town|Q644327|qid=Q644327|1=Motegi, Tochigi}} 325 Koido |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Deities = {{ill|lt=Kuninotokotachi-no-Kami|Q478504|qid=Q478504|lt=Kuninotokotachi-no-Mikoto|1=Kuni-no-Tokotachi}}
{{ill|lt=Kunisa-tsuchi-no-Mikoto|Q5966692|qid=Q5966692|1=Kunisatsuchi-no-Mikoto}}
{{ill|lt=Toyokumono-no-Mikoto|Q4387158|qid=Q4387158|lt=Toyokumonunu-no-Mikoto|1=Toyokumono-no-Mikoto}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} (minor)
Former {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto Shrines#Other shrines|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=Prefectural Shrine|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} |Founded = Year 1 of {{ill|lt=Daido (Japan)|Q1373191|qid=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|qid=Q30021|1=806}}) |Main hall = {{ill|lt=Gongen-zukuri|Q3155268|qid=Q3155268|1=Ishi-no-ma-zukuri}} copper-sheet roofing |Alternative name = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = {{ill|lt=April 17|Q2520|qid=Q2520|1=April 17}} |Rites = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=Munakata Shrine|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Arakashi Shrine''' (あらかしじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located at 325 Koido, {{ill|lt=Motegi Town|Q644327|qid=Q644327|1=Motegi, Tochigi}}, {{ill|lt=Haga District|Q1192087|qid=Q1192087|1=Haga District, Tochigi}}, {{ill|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|Q44843|qid=Q44843|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}. It is identified with the “Arakashi Shrine” of Haga District, {{ill|lt=Shimotsuke Province|Q1053699|qid=Q1053699|1=Shimotsuke Province}}, listed in the 『{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}』, though there are differing opinions. One theory holds that the Arakashi Shrine was enshrined together as an auxiliary shrine at {{ill|lt=Ōmae Shrine|Q11433065|qid=Q11433065|1=Ōsaki Shrine}}“Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Gazetteer,” p. 41. As a Shikinaisha, it is said to have been ranked fifth among the eleven shrines of Shimotsuke Province“Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Gazetteer,” p. 700. The enshrined deities are {{ill|lt=Kuninotokotachi-no-Kami|Q478504|qid=Q478504|lt=Kuninotokotachi-no-Mikoto|1=Kuni-no-Tokotachi}}, {{ill|lt=Kunisa-tsuchi-no-Mikoto|Q5966692|qid=Q5966692|1=Kunisatsuchi-no-Mikoto}}, and {{ill|lt=Toyokumono-no-Mikoto|Q4387158|qid=Q4387158|lt=Toyokumonunu-no-Mikoto|1=Toyokumono-no-Mikoto}}. === History === According to shrine tradition, it was founded in the first year of {{ill|lt=Daido (Japan)|Q1373191|qid=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|qid=Q30021|1=806}}). It stands atop Mount Takafuji, northeast of Kikyo Castle ({{ill|lt=Motegi Castle|Q11617091|qid=Q11617091|1=Motegi Castle}}), and is said to have been established to protect the castle from the demon’s gate (northeast). In the 6th year of {{ill|lt=Kyōhō|Q1145048|qid=Q1145048|1=Kyōhō}} ({{ill|lt=1721|Q6913|qid=Q6913|1=1721}}), with the support of the {{ill|lt=Hosokawa clan|Q2736120|qid=Q2736120|1=Hosokawa clan}}, who ruled the area, the shrine buildings were rebuilt. In the 4th year of {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} ({{ill|lt=1871|Q7746|qid=Q7746|1=1871}}), it became a Motegi Domain shrine, and in the 13th year of {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|qid=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} ({{ill|lt=1938|Q18645|qid=Q18645|1=1938}}), it was promoted to Prefectural Shrine rank. Prior to this, the shrine buildings were reconstructed from Shōwa 9 to 11. The precincts overlook the town center of Motegi and are covered with ancient cedar, zelkova, and oak trees estimated to be around 1,000 years old, within which the shrine buildings stand. In {{ill|lt=2018|Q25291|qid=Q25291|1=2018}}, the shrine served as a filming location for an {{ill|lt=au (mobile phone)|Q307110|qid=Q307110|lt=au|1=Au (mobile phone company)}} television {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=commercial|1=UNKNOWN}} titled “Santaro Series (Half-Price Shop Edition)”Yomiuri Shimbun, Tochigi edition, January 25, 2018, p. 33.. === Shrine rank === === Modern system of ranked Shinto Shrines === * September 30, Meiji 43 – Village ShrineFrom the “Village Shrine Designation Commemorative Monument” * February 14, Shōwa 13 – Prefectural ShrineFrom the “Prefectural Shrine Promotion Commemorative Monument” === Shrine grounds === File:Arakashi Shrine Honden.jpg|Main hall File:Arakashi Shrine First Torii.jpg|First torii gate File:Arakashi Shrine Second Torii.jpg|Second torii gate === Subsidiary shrines === * Inari Shrine * Kabayama Shrine File:Arakashi Shrine Subsidiary Inari Shrine 2.jpg|Inari Shrine File:Arakashi Shrine Kabayama Shrine.jpg|Kabayama Shrine === Festivals === * {{ill|lt=January 1|Q2150|qid=Q2150|1=January 1}}: New Year’s Day Festival * {{ill|lt=February 3|Q2315|qid=Q2315|1=February 3}}: Setsubun Festival * {{ill|lt=April 17|Q2520|qid=Q2520|1=April 17}}: Spring Grand Festival * {{ill|lt=August 25|Q2819|qid=Q2819|1=August 25}}: Wind Deity Festival * {{ill|lt=November 26|Q3019|qid=Q3019|1=November 26}}: Autumn Grand Festival === Cultural properties === A zelkova tree estimated to be 700 years old was designated a {{ill|lt=Natural Monument|Q23790|qid=Q23790|1=Natural monument}} of Tochigi Prefecture as of {{ill|lt=January 26|Q2282|qid=Q2282|1=January 26}}, {{ill|lt=1990|Q2064|qid=Q2064|1=1990}} ({{ill|lt=Heisei|Q234510|qid=Q234510|1=Heisei era}} 2). === Access === A 30-minute walk from {{ill|lt=Motegi Station|Q6917169|qid=Q6917169|1=Motegi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Mooka Railway|Q11240879|qid=Q11240879|1=Mōka Railway}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === References === * “Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Gazetteer,” Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Office, 2006 === External links === * [http://kir579053.kir.jp/jinjyacyo/?p=249 Arakashi Shrine] (Tochigi Prefecture Shrine Office) {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Arakashi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Arakashi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Arakashi Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:栃木県の旧県社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:茂木町の建築物]] [[Category:茂木町の歴史]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]]
